label: Active sessions
description: Concurrent sessions across app, web, and assisted channels.

label: P95 latency
description: End-to-end answer latency including retrieval and policy checks.

label: Retrieval success rate
description: Requests where grounded sources met freshness and relevance thresholds.

label: Answer groundedness
description: Evaluator score showing whether answers stayed anchored to retrieved evidence.

label: Human escalation rate
description: Sessions sent to human review or assisted support because risk or confidence thresholds were hit.

label: Cost per 1K requests
description: Blended cost including retrieval, model calls, and policy execution.

label: Cache hit ratio
description: Requests resolved partly through cached retrieval or answer artifacts.

label: Model fallback events
description: Requests rerouted to a fallback model because of cost, latency, or resilience triggers.
